data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E4E6: This area is covered in volcanic ash,\nhuff-puff!\pI'm specially gifted, huff-puff.\pI make glass out of volcanic ash\nand make items, huff-puff.\pGo collect ashes with this, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E59B:
Just take that SOOT SACK and walk
through piles of ash, huff-puff.\pAnd it will fill up with the volcanic ash,
huff-puff.\pOnce you think you've collected a good
amount, come see me, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E65B: Have you collected ashes, huff-puff?\nLet me see, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E697: Hmmm...\nThere's not enough ash here, huff-puff.\lI can't make glass with this, huff-puff.\pLet's see... {STR_VAR_1} is the number of steps\nyou'll need to walk for me to make you\la BLUE FLUTE, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E757: Oh!\nYou've got a lot of ashes, huff-puff!\pI'll make you a glass item, huff-puff!\nWhich one would you like, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E7CD: A {STR_VAR_1}, huff-puff?\nIs that the one for you, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E802: Which one would you like, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E827: A {STR_VAR_1} it is, then, huff-puff!\pOkay! I'll make it for you, huff-puff.\nJust wait a little while, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E890:
A {STR_VAR_1}, huff-puff?\pThere's not enough ash here to make
that, though, huff-puff.\pLet's see... {STR_VAR_2} is the number of steps
you'll need to walk through volcanic ash\lfor me to make that item, huff-puff.\pWhich item would you rather have me
make instead, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E990: You've collected all that ash, but you\ndon't want anything, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E9D7: Ah, I've finished your {STR_VAR_1}.\nTake it, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EA06: Oh?\nYou've no room in your BAG, huff-puff.\pI'll hold on to it, so come back later,\nhuff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EA64: Oh?\nYou've no room in your PC, huff-puff?\pI'll hold on to it, so come back later,\nhuff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EAC1: Hah? You haven't got your SOOT SACK\nwith you, huff-puff.\pYou have to keep it with you to collect\nvolcanic ash, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EB3B: It's fun to blow a glass flute while my\nboss is talking.\pHuff-huff! Puff-puff!
